stemHtml:
Which statement is correct?

I. At a given RPM the propeller efficiency of a fixed pitch propeller is maximum at only one value of TAS.
II. A constant speed propeller maintains near maximum efficiency over a wider range of aeroplane speeds than a fixed pitch propeller.

options.a: I is correct, II is incorrect.
options.b: I is correct, II is correct.
options.c: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
options.d: I is incorrect, II is correct.
